name: manage_subscribers
description: List, create, update, or delete subscribers from your Buttondown newsletter. You can filter subscribers by type (regular, unactivated, removed) and by tag. Supports pagination for large lists.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter subscribers by email address (exact match).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by subscriber type. Options: regular, unactivated, removed.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter subscribers by a specific tag ID.
